title: Trap Definitions
description: Schema for Pinder trap definition data files consumed by JsonTrapRepository.

display_name.description: Player-facing Title-Case name of the trap (e.g. 'Cringe', 'Creep'). Used in the failure-tier label and the activated-trap line. Optional; falls back to id when absent. (#255)

summary.description: Short one-sentence player-facing description of the trap's flavour. Distinct from llm_instruction (which is internal). Rendered under the activated-trap line. Optional; empty string omits the line. (#255)

stat.description: The stat that triggers this trap on a TropeTrap failure tier (miss by 6-9).

effect.description: The mechanical effect type applied while the trap is active.

effect_value.description: Magnitude of the effect. 0 for disadvantage (boolean effect), positive for stat_penalty/opponent_dc_increase.

duration_turns.description: Number of turns the trap remains active before expiring.

llm_instruction.description: Prompt taint instruction passed to the LLM to flavor generated messages while the trap is active.

clear_method.description: Description of how to clear the trap early (e.g. 'SA vs DC 12').

nat1_bonus.description: Extra punishment on Nat 1 while trap is active.
